With the red dot at [10, 28].

Actually, let me reconsider. What if the game is about clicking on the EMPTY cells inside the U-shapes to fill them with the bar's color? But looking at the current state, the U-shapes haven't changed. So either the pixel was transferred but not visible (maybe it filled the empty cell and now the U-shape is complete), or the pixel was just removed from the box without filling the U-shape.
